title: Pack of 9 Masking Tape Rolls (24mm x 35m) – Premium Quality Masking Tape for Painting, Decorating & Crafts, Low Tack, Residue-Free, Strong Adhesion, Ideal Paper Tape, Artist & Paint Use
features: High-Quality Masking Tape Rolls: EVOKK pack includes 9 premium white masking tape rolls (24mm x 35m), perfect for painters, decorators, artists, and DIY use. Delivers professional results trusted by industry experts

Multi-Purpose & Versatile Use: Ideal for painting walls, decorating, automotive masking, crafts, labeling, sealing, and DIY projects. Great as a paper tape, drafting tape, or low tack masking tape for delicate surfaces

Strong Adhesion with Clean Lines: This painter’s masking tape sticks securely to wood, glass, metal, and walls, delivering sharp paint lines without bleed-through. A reliable paint masking tape for both indoor and outdoor jobs

Easy Tear & Residue-Free Removal: Designed for smooth application and hassle-free removal. Leaves no sticky residue behind, ideal masking tape for painting, silicone sealant, trim, edges, and precision detail work

Professional Grade & Durable: Thick masking tape with strong hold and flexibility. Suitable for decorators masking tape needs, artists masking tape for watercolour painting, automotive spray painting, and general home improvement

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti Slip, Eco Friendly, Removable, Self-Adhering, Strong
